markdownRemark.excerpt: As-Salāmu ‘alaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s Ramaḍān Fiqh class will be held this Friday, August 29th at 7pm at Muṣallá As-Ṣaḥāba (with…
markdownRemark.html:
As-Salāmu ‘alaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s Ramaḍān Fiqh class will be held this Friday, August 29th at 7pm at Muṣallá As-Ṣaḥāba (with a telelink to As-Ṣaḥāba Library) instead of at its regular Sunday slot for this weekend only.

Please pass on this message.

Bārak Allāhu fīkum.

frontmatter.title: Ramaḍān Fiqh Class Moved
frontmatter.description: From Sunday to this Friday, August 29th
